## Positive Triggers
- "validate my wfc-build skill description"
- "check if my skill will route correctly"
- "find routing gaps in wfc-review skill"

## Negative Triggers
- "run the wfc-build skill"
- "review my code for bugs"
- "install wfc skills"

## Critique
**Severity**: WARNING
The description is moderately specific but overlaps with wfc-review for "review" terminology. Consider adding explicit "Not for:" negative triggers.

## Suggested Rewrite
LLM-based adversarial validator for WFC Agent Skill descriptions. Finds routing gaps, overlapping triggers, and ambiguous descriptions by stress-testing with generated positive/negative prompts. Not for: running skills, code review, or structural validation.
